summary: Task 2.2 FE validation — BackOfficeShell migration of 22 back-office routes. All shell wrapping, auth flow, sidebar nav, Cmd+K palette, and Smartico integrations probe verified PASS. Single shell sign-in works; no duplicate AuthGate appears on any inner route.

issues: A11y warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle (Radix). Wrap a visible/visually-hidden DialogTitle in BackOfficeShell.jsx CommandDialog. Non-blocking.

design_issues.screen: Email Templates + Mestari Diagnostics Copy pages
issues: Console warning [email-templates]/[diag-copy] DataCloneError: Failed to execute postMessage on Window. Originates from emergent-main.js (sandbox sendToParent trying to clone a Request object). Cosmetic/runtime warning only — app functions normally.

action_items: Naming mismatch in task description vs code: review_request used testids `bo-integrations-loader-url-input` and `bo-integrations-save-btn` but the page actually exposes `bo-smartico-loader-url` and `bo-smartico-save`. Either update the testids in BackOfficeIntegrations.jsx for consistency with the bo-integrations-* namespace, or update the spec — functionality itself works correctly with the existing testids.
(Optional) Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle to the Cmd+K CommandDialog inside BackOfficeShell.jsx to silence the Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: BackOfficeShell.jsx is a single large file (~600 lines) hosting AuthGate, sidebar, status strip, breadcrumb, Cmd+K. Consider splitting AuthGate + CommandPalette into separate components for maintainability.

The page-level shadowing pattern (per-page useOutletContext to override token/authed) is fragile — if a new back-office page is added inside the shell and forgets the shadow, the legacy per-page AuthGate would resurface. Consider deleting the legacy per-page AuthGate code entirely now that the shell is canonical (iter82+).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 25 back-office routes (the 22 in the brief + integrations + back-office index) render inside <BackOfficeShell />. Verified: (1) unauthed /back-office shows shell AuthGate with bo-shell-token-input/bo-shell-token-submit; (2) after one sign-in, sidebar (bo-shell-sidebar) + status strip (bo-shell-status-strip) render and persist across navigations; (3) no duplicate token-input gate appears on any inner route — page-specific testids all present (queue-page, operators-admin-page, streamers-admin-page, research-page, back-office-webhooks, back-office-drafts, bo-peli-page, back-office-profiler-funnel); (4) sidebar nav clicks (Bot & Routing, Settings, Integrations, Streamers, OG images) all navigate without re-auth and breadcrumb updates; (5) Cmd+K (Meta+k) opens the palette focusing bo-shell-cmdk-input and listing OPS/LEADS&RAFFLES nav items; (6) Integrations Smartico loader URL field (actual testid bo-smartico-loader-url, not bo-integrations-loader-url-input) enables the save button (bo-smartico-save) when value differs from persisted, and shows bo-smartico-dirty indicator. Smartico probe network failure expected in sandbox.
